            "SELECT option_name, option_value FROM $wpdb->options WHERE option_name IN ($placeholders)",
            $to_fetch

sinks.expression:
wp_send_json_error(
                array(
                    'error' => __( 'Error setting communications status', 'mailchimp-for-woocommerce' ),
                    'opt'   => $original_opt,
                    'reason' => 'invalid email',
                )
            )

wp_remote_post(
			esc_url_raw( $route ),
			array(
				'timeout'       => 12,
				'cache-control' => 'no-cache',
				'blocking'      => true,
				'method'        => 'POST',
				'data_format'   => 'body',
				'headers'       => array( 'Content-Type' => 'application/json; charset=utf-8' ),
				'body'          => json_encode( $post_data ),
			)
		)

wp_remote_post($this->endpoint(), array(
                'timeout'   => 12,
                'blocking'  => true,
                'method'      => 'POST',
                'data_format' => 'body',
                'headers'     => array('Content-Type' => 'application/json; charset=utf-8'),
                'body'        => json_encode($this->submitted_data),
            ))

printf( esc_html__('Most syncs take less than a few hours, but larger stores could take longer. We’ll send an email to %s when the sync is finished. Head to your Mailchimp dashboard to continue setup while your sync is in progress.', 'mailchimp-for-woocommerce'), $admin_email )

printf( esc_html__( 'Occasionally we may send you updates, articles and other news to the store’s admin email address. Choose whether or not you want to receive these messages at %s.', 'mailchimp-for-woocommerce' ), $admin_email )

$wpdb->query(
                    $wpdb->prepare(
                        "UPDATE $table 
                             SET job = %s, created_at = %s 
                             WHERE obj_id = %s AND job LIKE %s",
                        $serialized_job,
                        $created_at,
                        $job->id,
                        '%' . $job_class . '%'
                    )
                )
wp_die('You must specify an order id as the 2nd parameter.')
wp_die('You must specify a product id as the 2nd parameter.')

$wpdb->query( $wpdb->prepare( "INSERT INTO `$wpdb->options` (`option_name`, `option_value`, `autoload`) VALUES (%s, %s, %s) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `option_name` = VALUES(`option_name`), `option_value` = VALUES(`option_value`), `autoload` = VALUES(`autoload`)", $option, $serialized_value, $autoload ) )

$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT option_name, option_value FROM $wpdb->options WHERE option_name IN ($placeholders)",
            $to_fetch
        ) )

$wpdb->get_results( $wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT option_name, option_value FROM $wpdb->options WHERE option_name IN ($placeholders)",
            $to_fetch
        ) )

wp_remote_post(esc_url_raw($route), array(
            'timeout'   => 12,
            'blocking'  => true,
            'method'      => 'POST',
            'data_format' => 'body',
            'headers'     => array('Content-Type' => 'application/json; charset=utf-8'),
            'body'        => json_encode($request->get_params()),
        ))

wp_remote_post( admin_url( 'admin-ajax.php' ), array(
            'method'      => 'POST',
            'timeout'     => 45,
            'redirection' => 5,
            'httpversion' => '1.0',
            'blocking'    => false,
            'headers'     => array(),
            'body'        => array(
                'action'     => 'mailchimp_create_additional_runners',
                'instance'   => $i,
                'mailchimp_actionscheduler_nonce' => wp_create_nonce( 'mailchimp_additional_runner_' . $i ),
            ),
            'cookies'     => array(),
        ) )

sanitizers.expression:
wp_kses(_e('Add Mailchimp for WooCommerce to build custom segments,
send automations, and track purchase activity in Mailchimp', 'mc-woocommerce'), $allowed_html)

wp_kses(_e('Please provide a bit of information
about your WooCommerce store', 'mc-woocommerce'), $allowed_html)

wp_kses(_e('Please fill out the audience default
campaign information', 'mc-woocommerce'), $allowed_html)

wp_kses(_e('Please apply your audience settings. If you don’t
have an audience, you can choose to create one', 'mc-woocommerce'), $allowed_html)

wp_kses(_e('Connect your WooCommerce store to a
Mailchimp audience in less than 60 seconds', 'mc-woocommerce'), $allowed_html)
esc_url( wp_nonce_url( add_query_arg( array( 'handle' => sanitize_title($viewed_log) ), admin_url( 'admin.php?page=mailchimp-woocommerce&tab=logs&mc_action=remove_log' ) ), 'remove_log' ) )

esc_html(__('HTML tags allowed: and
', 'mc-woocommerce'))

wp_kses( __( 'To change the location of the opt-in
checkbox at checkout, input one of the available WooCommerce form actions.', 'mc-woocommerce' ), array( 'a' => array( 'href' => array() ) ) )
wp_kses( __( 'Have a larger store or having issues syncing? Consider using WP-CLI.', 'mc-woocommerce' ), array( 'a' => array( 'href' => array(), 'target'=> '_blank' ) ) )
wp_kses( __( 'Need help to connect your store? Visit the Mailchimp Knowledge Base.', 'mc-woocommerce' ), array( 'a' => array( 'href' => array(), 'target'=> '_blank' ) ) )
wp_kses( __( 'Want to tell us how we\'re doing? Leave a review on Wordpress.org.', 'mc-woocommerce' ), array( 'a' => array( 'href' => array(), 'target'=> '_blank' ) ) )

wp_kses( __( 'By using this plugin, Mailchimp will process customer information in accordance with their Privacy Policy.', 'mc-woocommerce' ), array( 'a' => array( 'href' => array(), 'target'=> '_blank' ) ) )
esc_html( date_i18n( get_option( 'date_format' ) . ' ' . get_option( 'time_format' ), filemtime( WC_LOG_DIR . $log_file ) ) )
esc_url( wp_nonce_url( add_query_arg( array( 'handle' => sanitize_title( $viewed_log ) ), admin_url( 'admin.php?page=mailchimp-woocommerce&tab=logs&mc_action=remove_log' ) ), 'remove_log' ) )

wp_kses( __( 'Enjoying this plugin? Leave us a review!', 'mailchimp-for-woocommerce' ), array( 'a' => array( 'href' => array(), 'target' => '_blank', 'class' => 'js-mailchimp-woocommerce-send-event', 'data-mc-event' => 'leave_review' ), ) )

wp_kses_post(sprintf( /* translators: %1$s - The Currency name and format (ex: USD | US Dollar) %2$s - Timezone name or offset (ex: America/New_York or UTC-4:00) %3$s and %5$s- tag open %4$s - tag close*/ __( 'We\'ve detected that your WooCommerce store\'s currency is %1$s (%3$schange%4$s), and the WordPress timezone is a %2$s (%5$schange%4$s). Please apply your locale settings. If you\'re unsure about these, use the defaults.', 'mailchimp-for-woocommerce' ), esc_attr( isset( $current_currency_data ) ? $current_currency . ' | ' . $current_currency_data['name'] : $current_currency ), mailchimp_get_timezone( true ) , '', '', '' ))

esc_html( __( 'HTML tags allowed: and
', 'mailchimp-for-woocommerce' ) )
esc_html( __( 'Leave it blank to use language translation files (.po / .mo), translating the string: "Subscribe to our newsletter".', 'mailchimp-for-woocommerce' ) )

$wpdb->prepare(
                        "UPDATE $table 
                             SET job = %s, created_at = %s 
                             WHERE obj_id = %s AND job LIKE %s",
                        $serialized_job,
                        $created_at,
                        $job->id,
                        '%' . $job_class . '%'
                    )

$wpdb->prepare( "INSERT INTO `$wpdb->options` (`option_name`, `option_value`, `autoload`) VALUES (%s, %s, %s) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `option_name` = VALUES(`option_name`), `option_value` = VALUES(`option_value`), `autoload` = VALUES(`autoload`)", $option, $serialized_value, $autoload )

$wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT option_name, option_value FROM $wpdb->options WHERE option_name IN ($placeholders)",
            $to_fetch
        )

$wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT option_name, option_value FROM $wpdb->options WHERE option_name IN ($placeholders)",
            $to_fetch
        )
esc_js(__('Please enter a valid phone number for SMS consent.', 'mailchimp-for-woocommerce'))
$wpdb->prepare("SELECT * FROM {$table} WHERE consumer_key = %s AND consumer_secret = %s", array($consumer_key, $secret))
$wpdb->prepare( "SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}mailchimp_jobs	WHERE obj_id = %s AND job LIKE %s", array($obj_id, "%{$current_action}%") )
$wpdb->prepare("DELETE FROM {$wpdb->prefix}mailchimp_jobs WHERE id = %s AND obj_id = %s", array($job_id, $obj_id))
esc_js(__('Please enter a phone number for SMS consent. This is not good.', 'mailchimp-for-woocommerce'))

$wpdb->prepare( "
				SELECT * FROM {$this->table}
				WHERE locked = 0
				AND available_at <= %s"
			, $now )

$wpdb->prepare( "
				UPDATE {$this->table}
				SET attempts = attempts + 1, locked = 0, locked_at = NULL
				WHERE locked = 1
				AND locked_at <= %s"
			, $expired )
